decisions.decision: Sprint stats join changed from sprint_id to sprint_name

decisions.decision: state=active,closed,future added to Jira Board Sprint API call
decisions.rationale: Without it Jira may omit closed sprints
If Jira unreachable, serve cached data with stale:true banner
